summary: Actions not SHA-pinned to commit SHA (best practice violation; should use pin-actions-to-sha skill). PESTER_VERSION env var defined (line 15) but never used in test step. Test file SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 not shown but implicitly required (harness checks for it, line ~82). Output parsing brittle: depends on exact strings ('Job succeeded', marker strings in expect substrings). Otherwise solid: proper Set-StrictMode, error handling, parameter validation, module exports.
